boxes.label: Additional claim information
boxes.guidance: Include the brand name and generic name, NDC, and total units. (Field designated by the NUCC.)

boxes.label: Diagnosis, nature of illness or injury
boxes.guidance: Add the ICD-10-CM diagnosis code(s) per the patient's condition.
boxes.watchOut: Diagnosis codes are selected only by a healthcare professional.

boxes.label: Resubmission code
boxes.guidance: When appealing a claim, add claims re-submission code #7 first, followed by the original reference number.

boxes.label: Prior authorization number
boxes.guidance: If required, add the prior authorization number provided by the payer.

boxes.label: Date(s) of service
boxes.guidance: Fill out the date(s) of service.

boxes.label: Place of service
boxes.guidance: Enter "11" for in-office services provided.
boxes.watchOut: Different place-of-service codes apply for facility settings.

boxes.label: Procedures, services, or supplies
boxes.guidance: Enter the relevant HCPCS code on line 1 and the relevant CPT code on line 2. If needed, add any modifiers in the appropriate modifier section.
boxes.watchOut: The J-code and CPT code go on separate service lines.

boxes.label: Diagnosis pointer
boxes.guidance: Add the letter from Box 21 that corresponds to the primary diagnosis of each HCPCS or CPT code entered in 24D.

boxes.label: Charges
boxes.guidance: Add the total charge(s) assigned to each service or procedure entered in 24D.

boxes.label: Days or units
boxes.guidance: Add the number of units of service for each code entered in 24D (typically 1). Contact the payer for more information.

boxes.label: Service lines — NDC / N4 qualifier
boxes.guidance: Report supplemental information in the shaded portion at the top of each service line. Add the 11-digit NDC; if needed, the N4 qualifier should be listed before the NDC. Check whether the payer requires a specific qualifier.

boxes.label: Description
boxes.guidance: Add a description of the product ID qualifier / NDC number that you enter in Box 44.

boxes.label: HCPCS / rate / product ID qualifier + NDC
boxes.guidance: Add the corresponding product ID qualifier / NDC number for the implant, immediately followed by the unit of measure / numeric quantity in Box 46.

boxes.label: Service units
boxes.guidance: Enter the unit of measure and numeric quantity for the implant.

boxes.label: Use the current form
boxes.guidance: To avoid delays, ensure you are using the most up-to-date Enrollment Form, which can always be accessed at organonaccessprogram.com/hcp.

boxes.label: Select the support you're requesting
boxes.guidance: Select support options you are requesting (Patient Benefit Investigation and/or Prescription Order). In some instances, the Patient Benefit Investigation will help determine which Specialty Pharmacy(ies) are in the patient's insurance network, which can avoid delays in processing.

boxes.label: Patient information
boxes.guidance: Fill out patient information completely.

boxes.label: Insurance information
boxes.guidance: Complete the information for the patient's insurance and supplementary insurance (if applicable). Include a copy of the front and back of any insurance card(s).

boxes.label: When the patient signature is required
boxes.guidance: Patient signature is NOT required if ONLY Patient Benefit Investigation support has been requested on page 1. If at any point a Prescription Order is requested, a patient signature will be required.

boxes.label: Patient signature line
boxes.guidance: Signature line for the patient (or for parent/guardian signing on the patient's behalf).

boxes.label: Date
boxes.guidance: Date is required.

boxes.label: Patient name (even if guardian signs)
boxes.guidance: Please list the patient's name (even if a parent/guardian is signing on the patient's behalf).

boxes.label: When the prescription section is required
boxes.guidance: Prescription Information section only required if "Prescription Order" support has been requested on page 1.

boxes.label: Match the version number across pages
boxes.guidance: The version control number is included on every page. To be considered a complete form, all pages of the same version number must be submitted.

boxes.label: Prescriber prescription signature
boxes.guidance: To complete the prescription, a signature and date are required for at least one of these signature lines (Product Substitution Permitted or Dispense as Written).

boxes.label: Missing information
boxes.guidance: If the form is submitted with missing information, the Office Contact will be notified to provide the missing information.

boxes.label: Diagnosis code
boxes.guidance: Please ensure the applicable diagnosis code is indicated (Z30.017, Z30.46, or Other).

boxes.label: Prescriber authorization signature
boxes.guidance: Prescriber Authorization signature is required for ALL Organon Access Program Enrollment Form submissions.

boxes.label: Date
boxes.guidance: Date is required.
